excerpt: In this post, we demonstrate how Amazon FinTech teams are using Amazon Bedrock and other AWS services to build a scalable AI application to transform how regulatory inquiries are handled. Each team using this solution creates and maintains its own dedicated knowledge base, populated with that team's specific documents and reference materials.
summary_hint: In this post, we demonstrate how Amazon FinTech teams are using Amazon Bedrock and other AWS services to build a scalable AI application to transform how regulatory inquiries are handled. title: How Amazon Finance streamlines regulatory inquiries by using generative AI on AWS
